mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in the unemployment rate above 5% signals deteriorating labor market conditions, reducing corporate earnings expectations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or UNRATE's predictive power fails in out-of-sample tests (p > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in housing starts (HOUST) and real sales (RSAFS) indicate weakening consumer demand, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through reduced corporate revenue expectations.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in demand contraction scenarios show positive median outcomes, or pairwise correlation between HOUST/RSAFS and SPX exceeds 0.2 in opposite directions.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden drop in industrial production (INDPRO) below its 12-month moving average signals supply chain disruptions, creating inflationary pressures that drive negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX shows positive 20-day returns in 60%+ of INDPRO decline scenarios, or the signal's predictive power fails in rolling 3-year backtests (IC < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A concurrent rise in payroll employment (PAYEMS) and fall in unemployment (UNRATE) signals a tightening labor market, increasing wage pressures that lead to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show positive median outcomes in 60%+ of interaction scenarios, or the combined signal's IC drops below 0.03 in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: A rising CPI (CPIAUCSL) above 208 combined with stable FEDFUNDS indicates persistent inflation, prompting central bank inaction that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns show positive median outcomes in 60%+ of triggered scenarios, or the interaction signal's IC falls below 0.05 in rolling 3-year tests.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in GDP (GDPC1) above its 4-quarter moving average indicates strong economic growth, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through improved corporate earnings.
failure_condition: SPX shows negative 20-day returns in 60%+ of GDPC1 expansion scenarios, or the signal's IC drops below 0.03 in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in industrial production (INDPRO) below 100 combined with rising CPI (CPIAUCSL) indicates stagflationary pressures, creating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through reduced corporate margins.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns show positive median outcomes in 60%+ of triggered scenarios, or the interaction signal's IC falls below 0.05 in rolling 3-year tests.
